channel.title: RSS Aggregator Feed
channel.description: An aggregated feed of Technology-related news

item.title: « L’IA n’est pas votre ami » : la patronne de Signal tire la sonnette d’alarme
item.description: Dans une récente interview, Meredith Whittaker, la patronne de Signal, est revenue sur la confiance que les utilisateurs sont en mesure d’accorder aux chatbots IA.

item.title: Midea PortaSplit : pourquoi ce climatiseur mobile à split est en rupture partout
item.description: Le Midea PortaSplit cartonne au point d’être en rupture un peu partout. Derrière l’engouement, une vraie astuce technique : il colle la puissance d’un climatiseur fixe à la liberté d’un climatiseur mobile, sans travaux.

item.title: Les 10 smartphones les plus populaires de la semaine sur Frandroid : Samsung en tête, Google conteste
item.description: Pour notre top 10 des smartphones les plus populaires de la semaine sur Frandroid, les téléphones Samsung restent très populaires même si Google vient contester cette situation. Viennent ensuite d'autres modèles sous Android pour compléter ce top 10.

item.title: How to watch the World Cup on Peacock for $1
item.description: This clever little trick lets you watch every single game of the 2026 World Cup on Peacock for a single dollar – but there's a catch...

item.title: How to automate workflows using open-source AI agents
item.description: One founder, one agent, one stack

item.title: Trouver 250 Go en 5G sous les 9 euros tient presque de l’exception, sauf chez cet opérateur
item.description: Lebara propose une formule taillée pour les grands consommateurs de data qui veulent un maximum de gigaoctets au plus bas prix, avec quelques limites à connaître avant de souscrire.

item.title: Meilleures enceintes Bluetooth : quel modèle portable étanche choisir en 2026 ?
item.description: Compactes et nomades, les enceintes Bluetooth s'invitent partout : du salon à la plage, elles sont devenues indispensables. Bienvenue dans notre sélection des meilleures enceintes Bluetooth étanches testées par notre rédaction.

item.title: AMD : le FSR 4 arrive enfin sur les Radeon RX 7000, mais aussi sur consoles portables
item.description: AMD vient de tenir une promesse qu'on n'attendait plus : son upscaling maison FSR 4.1 débarque officiellement sur les cartes Radeon RX 7000, un an après avoir été réservé aux seules RX 9000.

item.title: Noise-cancelling and open earbuds are down to record-low prices ahead of Prime Day
item.description: We've rounded up the best early earbud deals you can grab today, including the AirPods Pro 3 for $179.99.

item.title: Gmail vous laisse enfin modifier votre adresse en France
item.description: Après des années d'attente, Google vous permet enfin de modifier votre adresse Gmail principale. La procédure est simple et se fait via la page de gestion de votre compte Google.

item.title: The best Lego deals ahead of Prime Day — score a Botanicals set for less than $10
item.description: From Fortnite to NASA, we found 17 Lego sets on sale worth checking out ahead of Prime Day's start on June 23.

item.title: Prime Day starts tomorrow but cordless power tool deals are already live at Amazon
item.description: Save on cordless power tools at Amazon from Craftsman, DeWalt, Hoto, and more before Prime Day

item.title: J’ai testé la Samsung HW-QS90H : une barre de son qui se passe (presque) de caisson
item.description: La marque coréenne signe une barre de son tout‑en‑un ambitieuse, pensée pour remplacer le duo barre + caisson dans un unique châssis 7.1.2 canaux, avec 13 haut‑parleurs et un système Quad Bass Woofer censé suffire à lui seul pour le grave. Je l'ai testée en conditions réelles pour voir ce qu'elle vaut.

item.title: WhatsApp gets new chief as Meta taps India’s CRED founder Kunal Shah, and invests $900M in startup
item.description: WhatsApp gets a new boss, as Will Cathcart moves to a new role at Meta, while Shah steps down as CEO of Indian fintech giant CRED to replace Cathcart.

item.title: What is the release date for Sugar season 2 episode 2 on Apple TV?
item.description: Sugar season 2 continues this week, here's everything you need to know about when you can watch it.

item.title: Tesla in autopilot crashed into Texas home, killing one
item.description: One woman is dead after a Tesla with "an automated driving assistance system" engaged crashed into a home in Katy, Texas.

item.title: Web browsers and Cloudflare team up to authenticate human traffic to combat the growing malicious bot hordes and keep the internet authentic
item.description: Cloudflare is developing a protocol to verify legitimate human and AI agent web access

item.title: Veed gives you AI generative video and intuitive editing tools, all in one place, for less
item.description: Tired of using a bunch of unconnected apps and platforms to build a single video? VEED fixes that for you, and you can save up to 30% right now.

item.title: Last chance: The Jackery HomePower 3600 Plus is down to a record-low price, saving you over $1,000
item.description: The Jackery HomePower 3600 Plus portable power station is on sale for $1,499 at Amazon today only, down from $2,799.

item.title: Android : l’Europe veut obliger Google à vous permettre de désinstaller l’IA
item.description: La FSFE a soumis une demande à la Commission européenne pour interdire le téléchargement automatique de composants IA sur Android sans consentement utilisateur. L'organisation réclame par ailleurs l'arrêt de la vérification d'identité obligatoire pour tous les développeurs Android afin de préserver l'interopérabilité et le logiciel libre.

item.title: New leak reveals more about Samsung Galaxy Watch Ultra 2
item.description: Samsung might ditch the Classic model and go all-in on the Galaxy Watch Ultra this year, per a new leak.

item.title: Apple’s latest AirTags are cheaper than ever for Prime Day
item.description: Prime Day has brought a number of Apple deals, but one of the most useful if you’re planning to travel over the July 4th weekend or later this summer is on the new AirTags. The four-pack has dropped to a new low of $90 ($9 off) at Amazon and Best Buy, bringing the price of […]

item.title: 'Half a million hours of Ukraine conflict drone footage' to be used to train and deploy new AI models for autonomous targeting drone swarms
item.description: Enabled Intelligence set to use 500,000 hours of Ukraine war drone footage to train AI drones with real-world data.

item.title: Why agentic enterprises need to become learning systems
item.description: Presented by SplunkEvery day, organizations learn things their AI systems never get to use.A security analyst corrects an AI-generated investigation. A network engineer identifies the root cause of a recurring outage. An observability team discovers that a pattern of latency, logs and infrastructure changes predicts service degradation. A customer operations team learns which signals indicate an escalation is likely.Each moment contains valuable organizational knowledge. But in most enterprises, that knowledge disappears into tickets, dashboards, chat threads, post-incident reviews and the min...

item.title: Prime Day is almost here: We found 50+ deals on Apple, Sony, and Lego favorites you can shop early
item.description: Another Amazon mega sale starts June 23. Shop the best Prime Day deals on Sony headphones, Samsung TVs, Kindles, and Apple AirPods.

item.title: Don't rip yourself off when buying a console for GTA 6 — take advantage of these discounts and bundle deals
item.description: The best places to buy a console ahead of GTA 6 pre-orders.

item.title: Amazon propose le pack liseuse parfait avant l’été avec sa Kindle Colosoft bradée à -32 %
item.description: Que vous soyez fan de comics, de mangas ou simplement amateur de couvertures éclatantes, la Kindle Colorsoft est le compagnon idéal à glisser dans votre sac avant le départ en vacances. Surtout, qu'en ce moment, Amazon fait un pack en promo avec un étui (trois couleurs au choix) et un adaptateur offerts.

item.title: I'm using an Apple Watch SE 2, but I'm disappointed it won't be getting watchOS 27 — these are the models I'm considering upgrading to this Amazon Prime Day
item.description: Amazon already has early Prime Day deals on Apple Watches, and these are the ones to go for it if you want a kick out of watchOS 27.

item.title: Beat the heat LIVE — how to stay cool during the UK heatwave, tips, advice, best fans, portable AC and more
item.description: The UK is basking in another heatwave — so how can you stay cool? Here are our top tips on what to do and what to buy to stay chill.

item.title: The best Pokémon deals to grab before Prime Day — Walmarts Chaos Rising ETB price beats Amazon
item.description: Amazon's latest Prime Day sale runs from June 23 to 26, but there are plenty of Pokémon deals to buy in the TCG, video games, and other great gifts.

item.title: A newbie hacker used "vague, low-skill prompts" in Claude and Codex to breach 14 companies, and the AI Agents did all the legwork
item.description: A newbie hacker is still a newbie hacker, though, and this one left a few gaping holes in his work.

item.title: Redmagic dévoile sa tablette gaming OLED 185 Hz avec watercooling
item.description: Redmagic a officialisé sa nouvelle tablette gaming, la Gaming Tablet 5 Pro. Écran 185 Hz, Snapdragon 8 Elite Gen 5 et refroidissement liquide. Avec elle, Redmagic vise le titre de tablette de jeu la plus musclée du marché.

item.title: Someone made a website that simulates sonic reflections in a room and spots how acoustic treatment affects them, so you can design your perfect home theater or hi-fi listening space
item.description: Roomtreatment.diy can help you plan where to put your home cinema and/or hi-fi speakers

item.title: Xiaomi fait disparaître l’une de ses marques historiques de smartphone
item.description: Le divorce est consommé entre Xiaomi et sa filiale gaming Black Shark. Les produits ont été discrètement retirés des boutiques officielles tandis que la communauté logicielle ferme ses portes.

item.title: 'Fungalpunk' RPG Signet City isn't afraid to be weird and political
item.description: Gareth Martin drew on diverse inspirations for Signet City, from horror manga to a musical from Sting.

item.title: Instagram for TV is now available on Samsung TVs in the US
item.description: Instagram's TV app is expanding to Samsung TVs in the US, half a year after it launched for Amazon Fire TV devices.

item.title: This robotic arm charges your EV so you don’t have to
item.description: Xiaomi is making a robotic charger that will plug directly into your car, no hands necessary. Xiaomi has just launched a fully automatic robotic arm that charges a parked car without human assistance.

item.title: Prime Day isnt here yet, but these 3 noise-cancelling headphones are already at record prices
item.description: Mashable's audio expert found the best Prime Day deals on noise-cancelling headphones from brands like Sony, Apple, and Nothing.

item.title: Struggling to load Outlook email replies? You’re not alone — an update has broken email threading and a fix is yet to be released
item.description: Email replies aren't showing on Outlook for Mac, and a previous update is to blame.

item.title: 6 of the best Prime Day Apple deals at Amazon UK — record-low prices for the AirPods, iPhone 17, Apple Watch, and more
item.description: Amazon has already launched its deals on top Apple tech for Prime Day, including the lowest prices we've ever seen for the AirPods, iPhone 17, MacBook Neo, and more.

item.title: How AI fraud rings are taking on retail
item.description: AI-powered fraud rings are automating scams faster than retailers can detect or stop them.

item.title: Researchers introduce Self-Harness, a framework that lets AI agents rewrite their own rules, boosting performance up to 60%
item.description: Not every company can or should build their own frontier AI language model. However, the harness controlling the model is something that most enterprises can and should customize for their specific purposes.Of course, this is easier said than done. Agent harnesses are still largely tuned through manual, ad hoc debugging — a process that relies heavily on intuition rather than systematic feedback loops, making it difficult to keep pace with rapidly evolving LLMs.To solve this challenge, researchers at the Shanghai Artificial Intelligence Laboratory have introduced “Self-Harness,” a new paradigm...

item.title: How to set up the smartest Galaxy AI features on your new Samsung Galaxy S26, step by step
item.description: A practical walkthrough of the Galaxy AI features worth setting up the moment you take your new Samsung Galaxy S26 out of the box.

item.title: Test du Honor MagicBook 16 (2026) : toujours un bon rapport qualité / prix
item.description: Honor nous a habitués avec sa gamme MagicBook à nous offrir d'excellents rapports qualité/prix. Le MagicBook 16 de 2026 ne déroge pas à la règle, mais doit faire des concessions.

item.title: Vibe coding guide: How to transition from AI generation to live deployment
item.description: A practical guide to moving your AI-generated app from a working prototype to a secure, reliable product that real users can actually depend on.

item.title: The Apple MacBook Air M3 just hit a record-low price at Amazon — buy now for $799
item.description: Amazon dropped the Apple MacBook Air M3 to an all-time low of $799. Shop this pre-Prime Day deal before the main event kicks off.

item.title: Are Reddit and X down? Here's what we know their reported issues today
item.description: Reddit, X and several other sites and services were reportedly down for many earlier today, but seem to be recovering — here's what we know so far.

item.title: WhatsApp head Will Cathcart is stepping down after seven years
item.description: Will Cathcart, who led WhatsApp for the past seven years, is stepping down from his role as Meta appoints a new leader. On Monday, Meta CEO Mark Zuckerberg announced on Facebook that Kunal Shah, the founder of an Indian fintech startup called Cred, is taking over as the head of WhatsApp. Cred is an app […]

item.title: Instagram looks to take on streaming services with longer-form, episodic and live formats for its TV app
item.description: Instagram is coming for streaming services like Netflix and Amazon Prime Video as it sets its ambitions for living room viewing.

item.title: The LG OLED Ultragear WQHD gaming monitor is under $900 at Amazon — last chance to save $800
item.description: Grab the LG UltraGear 45-inch OLED curved gaming monitor for $899.99 at Amazon. That's $800 off its usual $1,699.99 price, marking a 47% discount on this gaming monitor.

item.title: X est en panne : « les posts ne se chargent pas pour l’instant »
item.description: Le réseau social X (anciennement Twitter) semble en panne. Impossible d'accéder aux publications.

item.title: How to watch Argentina vs Austria: Free Streams, TV Channels & Kick-Off time as Lionel Messi aims to make history at FIFA World Cup 2026, team news
item.description: Lionel Messi starts for Argentina against Austria as he eyes another record at the FIFA World Cup 2026. Here's how to watch the Group J clash for free online and from anywhere.

item.title: Fréquence cardiaque : les AirPods Pro 3 bluffent jusqu’aux spécialistes
item.description: Des écouteurs sans fil qui mesurent votre cœur presque aussi bien qu'une Apple Watch, à 150 euros de moins. Les tests récents donnent des résultats difficiles à ignorer, même pour les sceptiques.

item.title: Patreon CEO Jack Conte on supporting artists in the AI slop era
item.description: Today, I’m talking with Jack Conte, the CEO of Patreon. Jack last joined me on the show almost exactly five years ago, in the summer of 2021, and a lot has changed on the internet and in the creator landscape since then, so I was very excited to talk to him again, especially since his […]

item.title: The founder conference built for growth: TechCrunch Founder Summit pass rates increase June 26
item.description: Save up to $190 on your pass to TechCrunch Founder Summit 2026 by June 26, 11:59 p.m. PT. Designed for founders first on November 4 in Boston. Register here.

item.title: You probably haven’t heard of ‘desire lines,’ but they just reinvented this airport’s concourse
item.description: Behavioral data and the airport’s shopping-based business model became the driving elements of an eye-grabbing space. Inside Frankfurt Airport‘s new Terminal 3 building, there is a concourse that defies the standard logic of airport design. While the business model of most airports has made the airside space past security checkpoints into aggressive shopping malls interspersed with rows of gate seating, the German airport has made a sizeable chunk of its new terminal into a sinuous plaza worthy of a casual stroll. For those not running to make a connection or hopelessly searching for a place t...

item.title: How to watch Argentina vs. Austria online for free
item.description: How to watch World Cup for free. Live stream Argentina vs. Austria in the 2026 FIFA World Cup for free from anywhere in the world.

item.title: Canicule : attention, il est déconseillé de jouer à la Nintendo Switch 2
item.description: La Nintendo Switch 2 n'a pas été conçue pour résister à l'épisode caniculaire que traverse la France.

item.title: watchOS 27 : voici pourquoi 5 Apple Watch n’ont pas droit à la mise à jour
item.description: L'annonce de watchOS 27 en a refroidi plus d'un : seuls 6 modèles d'Apple Watch pourront installer la mise à jour, en laissant 5 sur le carreau. Apple s'explique.
